note: Block-6700 banner now spells out the V10 cascade for ALL realistic raw_base_H values, not just H10. The cascade formula is base-agnostic: eff = max(base - floor((elapsed - 600)/60) - 1, E7) for elapsed >= 600 s. raw_base_H lives in [B0, H13] — it is never negative because target_profile clamps to B0 when lag <= 0; the cascade then maps it into [E7, H13]. Banner adds a multi-base table (H10/H11/H12/H13) and the base-agnostic formula box. docs/granular_relief_fork_6700.md gains the full schedule across 8 bases (B0..H13) plus a time-to-E7 summary; H13 reaches the floor at 1740 s, comfortably below the 3600 s anti-stall threshold. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
